name: Spotio
description: Mobile logging flow reference — closest analogue to the rep's daily quick-log experience. Minimize taps between 'open app' and 'call logged.'

name: Pipedrive
description: Opportunity progression UI reference — stage-based pipeline and kanban-to-detail-view pattern informs opportunity history and next-step flow.

name: Ambition
description: Gamification & motivation layer reference — leaderboards, streaks, celebration moments. 'Fun rather than forced' philosophy for private bests and percent-to-goal competition.

name: LevelEleven
description: Dashboard & pacing concept reference — 'am I ahead or behind right now?' answered with a single color-coded glance. Direct antecedent to the flight deck dashboard.
